# Angular Calendar ‚Äî full reference for LLMs

> `@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar` is a modern, theme-agnostic, signals-first calendar and
> resource-scheduler library for Angular 20/21/22. It renders caller-supplied event data through a
> set of tree-shakable standalone view components, drops onto any colour scheme via a small set of
> colour inputs, and is mobile/touch-first. Standalone, zoneless, OnPush, SSR-safe. MIT-licensed.

## Install

```
npm i @ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar date-fns date-fns-tz rrule
```

Peer dependencies: `@angular/core`, `@angular/common`, `@angular/platform-browser` ‚Äî matching your
Angular major (`^22`, `^21` or `^20`). Runtime deps `date-fns`, `date-fns-tz`, `rrule`.

Secondary entry points (optional, tree-shakable):
- `@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar/date-fns` ‚Äî the default date adapter (`provideDateFnsAdapter`, `DateFnsDateAdapter`).
- `@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar/recurrence` ‚Äî RRULE recurrence adapter (`provideRruleAdapter`).
- `@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar/export` ‚Äî CSV / ICS / Excel export + print (`eventsToCsv`, `eventsToIcs`, `eventsToExcelXml`, `CalPrintService`).

## Versions

The package major tracks the Angular major, one release line each:
- Angular 22 ‚Üí `@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar@latest` (22.x)
- Angular 21 ‚Üí `@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar@ng21` (21.x)
- Angular 20 ‚Üí `@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar@ng20` (20.x)

## Setup

```ts
import { provideCalendar, withDateAdapter, withDefaults } from '@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar';
import { provideDateFnsAdapter } from '@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar/date-fns';
import { provideRruleAdapter } from '@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar/recurrence';

export const appConfig: ApplicationConfig = {
  providers: [
    provideCalendar(
      withDateAdapter(provideDateFnsAdapter()),
      withDefaults({ timezone: 'America/New_York', weekStartsOn: 0 }),
    ),
    provideRruleAdapter(),
  ],
};
```

## Views (selectors + purpose)

- `cal-month-view` ‚Äî month grid, lane-packed events, all-day band, "+N more" overflow (`[maxLanes]`).
- `cal-time-grid` ‚Äî week or day time-grid (`[days]`, `[dayStartMinutes]`, `[dayEndMinutes]`, `[slotMinutes]`). Set `orientation="horizontal"` for week-as-rows (time left‚Üíright, days stacked).
- `cal-timeline-view` ‚Äî resource scheduler / dispatch board; `[resources]` (flat or a `parentId` tree), `[headerGroupings]`, drag to reschedule/reassign, `(externalDrop)` for drag-in.
- `cal-agenda-view` ‚Äî chronological list grouped by day (`[hideEmptyDays]`).
- `cal-year-view` ‚Äî twelve mini-months with per-day event heat; `(daySelected)`, `(monthSelected)`.
- `cal-recurrence-editor` ‚Äî standalone RRULE editor with two-way `[(rule)]`.
- `cal-timezone-picker` ‚Äî IANA timezone picker with two-way `[(value)]`.

## Inputs (shared unless noted)

`[events]` (required, `CalendarEvent[]`), `[viewDate]` (required, `Date | { epochMs, zone }`), `[today]`,
`[now]`, `[themeMode]` (`'light' | 'dark'`), `[baseColor]` (hex), `[accentColor]` (hex),
`[statusColors]` (`Record<string,string>`), `[accentInk]`, `[locale]`, `[timezone]` (IANA),
`[weekStartsOn]`, `[calendarSystem]`. Time-grid/timeline add `[editable]`, `[snapMinutes]`,
`[validateChange]`, `[inlineEdit]`; time-grid adds `[orientation]`, `[anchorToWeek]`, `[density]`;
timeline adds `[resources]` (required), `[headerGroupings]`, `[hourWidth]`, `[laneHeight]`; month adds `[maxLanes]`.

## Outputs

`(eventClicked)` ‚Üí `{ event }`; `(eventChanged)` ‚Üí an `EventChange`
(`{ kind: 'move'|'resize'|'create'|'inline-edit'; event; start?; end?; resourceId?; title? }`);
`(daySelected)` / `(monthSelected)` ‚Üí `{ date }`; `(slotSelected)`; `(viewPeriodChanged)` ‚Üí
`{ start, end, zone }`; `(resourceToggled)`; `(externalDrop)` ‚Üí `{ date, resourceId }`.

State contract: the host is authoritative. On `(eventChanged)` you update your own event array and feed
a new immutable array back into `[events]`; the library never mutates your data. `[validateChange]`
returning `false` vetoes a drag before it commits.

## Event model

```ts
interface CalendarEvent<TMeta = unknown> {
  id: string;
  start: Date | { epochMs: number; zone: string };
  end?: Date | { epochMs: number; zone: string };
  allDay?: boolean;
  title?: string;
  status?: string;                 // keyed into statusColors
  resourceIds?: readonly string[]; // timeline lane assignment
  recurrenceRule?: string;         // RFC 5545 RRULE
  recurrenceExceptions?: readonly (Date | { epochMs; zone })[];
  cssClass?: string;
  isReadonly?: boolean;
  isBlock?: boolean;               // renders as a shaded block-out band
  meta?: TMeta;
}
```

## Theming

Two colours cover ~90%: `[baseColor]` (neutral anchor), `[accentColor]` (interactive), `[themeMode]`,
plus a `[statusColors]` map. Colours run through an OKLCH pipeline (`deriveTheme`) with AA-contrast
guarantees, emitting scoped `--cal-*` CSS custom properties written on the host (`applyTheme`). Any
single `--cal-*` token is host-overridable for the long tail; component CSS reads only `var(--cal-*)`
and hard-codes no colours.

## Headless engine

Pure, DOM-free, unit-testable exported functions: `buildMonthView`, `buildTimeGridView`,
`buildTimelineView`, `buildAgendaView`, `buildYearView`; layout `packColumns`, `packRows`,
`offsetFraction`, `sizeFraction`, `computeRowWindow`; recurrence `expandRecurringEvents`,
`addRecurrenceException`, `splitSeriesAt`; theming `deriveTheme`, `applyTheme`; utilities
`filterByStatus`, `flattenResources`.

## Timezone correctness

Every instant carries an explicit IANA zone (`{ epochMs, zone }`); positioning and boundaries are
computed in that zone's wall clock, so events land correctly across DST transitions. The date adapter
is pluggable (`DATE_ADAPTER`); the default is `date-fns` + `date-fns-tz`. A Temporal adapter can drop in later.

## Accessibility & security

WCAG 2.2 AA; ARIA grid/listbox/application patterns; every interaction keyboard-operable; the event
dialog has a focus trap (`CalFocusTrap`: Tab/Shift+Tab wrap + focus restore); reduced-motion honoured;
passes axe with zero violations. Caller content is never set via `innerHTML`; rendering is sanitized
and Trusted-Types / strict-CSP clean; no `eval`/`Function`; runtime deps are peers; `npm audit` clean.

## Links

- Docs & live demo: https://angular-calendar.ascentspark.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/ascentspark/angular-calendar
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar
